title: Indulgent Crisp Egyptian Blueberries Mousse
description: A floral, crisp mousse that blends fresh blueberries with tempered chocolate for a refreshing post-workout treat. Its airy texture and vitamin‑rich berries make it a nourishing dessert.
instructions: Whisk aquafaba until slightly frothy, then set aside.
In a saucepan, combine almond milk and agar‑agar, heat to 70°C while stirring until the agar dissolves.
Whisk in coconut cream, honey, vanilla extract, lemon zest, and a pinch of sea salt until smooth.
Melt the chocolate over a double boiler until it reaches 40°C, then remove from heat and cool until 31°C.
Fold the tempered chocolate into the coconut mixture until fully incorporated.
Gently fold in the fresh blueberries, being careful not to break them.
Divide the mousse among four serving glasses, smoothing the tops.
Refrigerate the glasses for at least 120 minutes to set.
Before serving, garnish each glass with an extra handful of blueberries and a sprig of mint.
Enjoy the airy, floral mousse as a refreshing post‑workout dessert.
